Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Phill Kilduff, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, 2925 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, an incorporated association.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NIKOLAS T. SIKELIANOS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Leif Ranestad sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment of Foreclosure of Real Property Assessment Lien in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant. See scanned Judgment on file.
Judgment signed in open court.
